name: When Pretty Isn't Useful: Investigating Why Modern Text-to-Image Models Fail as Reliable Training Data Generators
summary: arXiv:2602.19946v5 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Recent text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models produce visually stunning images and demonstrate excellent prompt following. But do they perfor...
description: arXiv:2602.19946v5 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Recent text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models produce visually stunning images and demonstrate excellent prompt following. But do they perform well as synthetic vision data generators? In this work, we revisit the promise of synthetic data as a scalable substitute for real training sets and uncover a surprising performance regression. We g...
author: Krzysztof Adamkiewicz, Brian Bernhard Moser, Stanislav Frolov, Tobias Christian Nauen, Federico Raue, Andreas Dengel
